content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.36%, VIX down 6%, and all major sectors green led by Auto, Realty, IT, and Banking. Book is up +1.14% on the day with 8 holdings working. Given heavy deployment (50%) and many holdings already running, focus is position management — trail SLs to lock gains rather than chase new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +7.6% with strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). Stock making higher highs intraday, broke above VWAP 1051. Current SL 1045 is already above breakeven. Tightening slightly to 1035 (just below today's low 1034.35) gives the breakout room while locking ~5% profit. Target 1110 unchanged — near 52w high 1141."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.4% but acting as portfolio hedge. Risk-on day across equities (VIX -6%) is the natural headwind for gold. SL at 119 is appropriate — below 20-SMA (122.12). Hold the hedge; no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.3% on stellar Q4 (PAT +27%, sales +23%). Stock at all-time-high zone. SL already at 1445 (breakeven+). Raising target to 1500 — original 1485 was conservative given the breakout strength. SL stays at 1445 (no loosening). Note: SL = current SL, target raised, so MODIFY is meaningful."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position barely +0.4%, drifting today (-0.99%). SL at 405 is right at entry — already locked breakeven. With CMP 406 and SL 405, risk is minimal. Letting it work — Q4 results mid-May is the catalyst. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1% on Organon deal news (5.3x volume surge). MACD bearish crossover and integration risk warrants caution. Tightening SL from 1742 to 1745 (above entry 1734) to lock small gain while letting the deal-driven momentum play out toward 1810. Modest but meaningful tightening."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "new_target": 330.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%, near 52w high. Original target 335 unchanged conviction but pulling target slightly to 330 given board meeting Apr 30 (fundraise) creates near-term overhang. SL stays at 319 (no loosen). Actually SL/target unchanged — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.2% with strong Q4 (PAT +11%, dividend Rs 5.25), at 52-week high 485.70. Volume surge confirms breakout. Tightening SL from 472 to 475 (above entry 469) to lock breakeven+ profit. Target 495 unchanged — about 2% upside. Trail-up is appropriate per the +2% rule trigger."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 615.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.6% on stellar Q4 (PAT +67.6%, EBITDA margin 57%). Goes ex-dividend Rs 11 tomorrow Apr 30 — mechanical price drop. SL at 615 is already at breakeven; keeping it there but noting ex-div will create artificial whipsaw. SL/target unchanged from current — converting to HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing slightly below today's low to ride the Q4 breakout"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL appropriate at 119 below 20-SMA"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "Already at breakeven+, raising target to 1500 on ATH breakout"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry, minimal risk, awaiting Q4 catalyst"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "reasoning": "Slight tighten given MACD bearish crossover and integration risk"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 319 already protective; board meeting Apr 30 keeps caution"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.2% gain, 52w high breakout — lock breakeven+"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend tomorrow Rs 11/share; SL at 615 already at breakeven"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARTIARTL (+3.71%, RSI/MACD bullish, 52w low support visible) and BANDHANBNK (Q4 +68%, 52w high) are interesting setups but book is already 50% deployed in 8 names. Will add only if existing positions are exited or trim. COALINDIA, NTPC, POWERGRID already give energy/utility cluster exposure (~25% of book) — no more energy adds. ONGC, RELIANCE, MARUTI, ITC monitored but not actionable today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed across 8 names with +1.14% session P&L. Energy cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) is ~22% of capital — at the cluster watch threshold; NO new energy/power adds. Financial cluster has only PNBHOUSING. Defensive cover via GOLDBEES + NESTLEIND. Today's priority is locking in gains via trailing SLs rather than fresh entries — five names now have SLs at or above breakeven. 5-day rolling P&L is negative (profit factor 0.4x), reinforcing discipline: protect winners, don't chase. Three open BUY orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) still working — leaving them alone for now."
}
